name: bypass
description: Bypass the 'next user action' punt — DEFAULT BEHAVIOR (auto-fires, not opt-in). Before emitting any 'user action:' / 'you need to run:' block, the agent self-checks: if the commands are agent-executable (no interactive input, no unauthorized destructive ops, no external visible messages), just run them. Cross-project always-on enforcement in commons.tape ≥0.7.2; this skill is the named handle + fallback reinforcement surface.
